description: Style NoteInspired from traditional jewellery designs, estelle comes up with this lovely pair of earrings guaranteed to dress up any outfit. A simple way to refine your ensemble - be it casual or formal. Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsEarring shaped like two criss-crossing curves, one in silver and one goldHas a white stone embellishment at the tipsHas a post and back closureMaterial and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalEarring posts made of hypo-allergic surgical steel to avoid skin allergiesHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 3.6 cm
